pages.title: Commands
pages.text: for server admins and those with cheat mode enabled, $(6)Blood Magic$() now has some useful commands: $(li)$(l)/bloodmagic network <username> add [amount]$() adds the given amount of LP to the listed player's $(l:bloodmagic:altar/soul_network)Soul Network$()$(li)$(l)/bloodmagic network <username> query$() lists the current total for

that player's Soul Network (akin to using a $(l:bloodmagic:alchemy_array/sigil/divination)Divination Sigil$() bound to them)$(li)$(l)/bloodmagic network <username> reset$() empties their Soul Network$(li)$(l)/bloodmagic network <username> set [amount]$() sets the total LP in their soul network to the given amount.
